title: Emerald Expansions
description: Expansions for emeralds, because emeralds are boring. Made for ModFest: Singularity
body: Emeralds are boring. You can only use them for trading and you can get a lot of them in a short time with trading... And at the end, you have no use for it. --- [](https://quiltmc.org) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modfest.net) Here is how to fix it! Install **Emerald Expansions** and make emeralds 100% more exciting! Emerald Expansions is made for ModFest: Singularity --- This is my first mod and I made this in one day for ModFest so please don't smash me if its bad, thank you :)
